name: maya-c1-parent-reaction
walkthrough_voiceover: I made a story for my five-year-old. Twenty-four hours later, the preview landed in my inbox. I cried before it finished playing. I bought the full one. Now she asks for it every night.

spoken_captions.text: I cried before it finished playing.

end_card.headline: The preview converts. Listen and see.
end_card.subline: Free 2-min preview · £24.99 if you love it
